response:
这段话整体是通顺的，表达清晰，但可以稍作润色，使其语气更加正式和流畅，尤其适用于商务沟通场景。以下是优化后的版本：

---

As you know, your company has been selected as one of the suppliers for the Centric Brands Packaging Optimization Project. To support this initiative, we would like to invite you to a training session on June 8th, from 9:30 AM to 10:30 AM, via Microsoft Teams. The session will be conducted in English and is designed to introduce the Centric Brands Compliance System.

---

如果你希望进一步去除任何可能的 PII（尽管原文中并未包含具体个人信息），也可以将“your company”替换为更通用的表达，例如“the selected supplier”或“your organization”，但根据上下文，“your company”是合适的，因为它指的是与发件人有业务关系的公司。
